title: Shacharayim #7842
definition:
Shaharaim = "double dawn"

 1) a Benjamite, father of Jobab, Zibia, Mesha, Malcham, Jeuz,
    Shachia, Mirma, Abitub, and Elpaal
nasbUsage:
